name: Keap
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Keap Does

Keap, formerly Infusionsoft, is the big engine of small business automation. For agencies that enjoy building complex funnels, such as multi-step email sequences for niche clients like dental groups, Keap is hard to match. It is well-suited for agency owners who want to set up sophisticated automations once and let them run with minimal ongoing effort. 

Source: G2

​Key Features

  • ​Advanced Automation Builder: A visual canvas to build sequences for everything from lead capture to invoice reminders.
  • ​Automated Billing: It “chases” late payments with automated email triggers, reducing manual collections work.
  • ​Lead Scoring: Automatically tags and ranks leads based on engagement.
  • CRM and Pipeline Management: Centralizes contacts, deals, and client activity in a customizable pipeline, giving agencies clear visibility into every stage of the client lifecycle.

​Benefits of Keap

  • ​Consistent Follow-Up: Keap ensures those 7 to 10 touches needed to close an SMB deal happen automatically.
  • ​Reduced Admin Overhead: Automating appointments and follow-ups can save hours of staff time every week.
  • Improved Cash Flow: Automated invoicing, payment reminders, and recurring billing help agencies get paid faster and reduce revenue leakage.

​Pricing

Keap recently simplified to a unified model starting at $299/month for basic features with 1,500 contacts and 2 users.

​Pros

​✅ The most robust automation engine in the SMB market.

✅ Combines CRM, billing, and landing pages in one tool.

​Cons

​🚫 Can be overwhelming and expensive for simple agency needs.

🚫 Interface can feel dated compared to modern “App-style” CRMs.

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“Keap was a great starting point for marketing and automation, with its pipelines and stages working really well. It serves as a solid introduction to CRM. However, it does not offer enough flexibility for complete customization.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
